mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.rating, f.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.rating, f.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id WHERE LOWER(f.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.cuisine) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.store_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food (name, cuisine, store_name, rating, destination_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{cuisine}, #{storeName}, #{rating}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE food SET name = #{name}, cuisine = #{cuisine}, store_name = #{storeName}, rating = #{rating}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}
